screening_locator: p. 12, Appendix B, 'Experiment design', first two sentences
deciding_source_fact: Appendix B, 'Experiment design' (p. 12) states that the authors adapt a random track generator for the F1TENTH simulator and generate four new tracks, one for training and three for validation.
protocol_reasoning: This is direct full-text evidence that the source implements an adapted generator which produces multiple racing tracks, satisfying the core generated-course retention condition. The adjacent racing-line computation, MPC execution, and controller evaluation described in the same experiment are fixed-course control activities and are not treated as a generator or as supporting-transfer evidence. Under v8, the retained result therefore uses the sole inclusion criterion include-relevant.
